description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content update (published: July 16, 2026)

Registration for the Summer Kids' History Class "Must-Have Postcard" program has closed because we've reached capacity.

The program was scheduled for July 23, 2026 (Thursday) from 10:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. at Hanno City Museum. Children solve a mystery game while exploring the museum to find their favorite exhibit, create an original postcard about it, and display it in the exhibition room with a description of why it's their favorite. Each child takes their completed postcard home as a souvenir.

Target: Elementary school students (parents may attend). Free admission.

Applications are no longer being accepted.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kyoikubu/hakubutsukan/tenji_moyooshimono/13540.html
summary: ℹ️ Summer Kids' History Class: "Find Your Favorite and Make It! Your 'Must-Have' Postcard" (Registration closed)
